title: Add commercial data vendors with better coverage and freshness.
content:
Add commercial data vendors with better coverage and freshness.

Data Sources:
  1. Dun & Bradstreet API (D&B Direct 2.0)
    • DUNS numbers, credit scores, payment trends
    • Company hierarchies, business relationships
    • Cost: ~$0.10-0.50 per lookup
    • Endpoint: https://direct.dnb.com/v1/match/cleanseMatch

  1. Google Places API
    • Business reviews, ratings, sentiment
    • Opening hours, photos (expansion signals)
    • Cost: $0.017 per request (Place Details)

  1. Clearbit Enrichment API
    • Employee count, tech stack, social profiles
    • Cost: $0.50-1.00 per enrichment

  1. Permit Data (via BuildingConnected or PermitData.io)
    • Construction permits (expansion signals)
    • Cost: ~$0.25 per permit lookup
context: From document: data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform — chunk 4 (chunk 4/32)
